Instance Method# getLogicalMax

DriverKit 19.0+macOS

```
uint32_t getLogicalMax();
```

## [Return Value](/documentation/HIDDriverKit/IOHIDElement/getLogicalMax#return-value)

Returns the element’s logical maximum.
